fixes.origin:
cmd = f"sh -c 'printf %s {right}'"
good = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True,
    capture_output=True,
    encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
good = subprocess.run(["printf", "%s", right],
    shell=False,
    capture_output=True,
    encoding="utf-8")

static_findings.message: subprocess execution may allow OS command injection if input is not controlled.
